---
title: "Tyler Wright"
subtitle: "Data Science Portfolio"
---

# Tyler Wright

Welcome to my data science portfolio.

## About Me
I am a Computer Science student at BYU-Idaho with experience in programming, machine learning, and data analysis. This site highlights my work and skills.

## Navigation
- [Resume](resume.qmd)

## Projects
This portfolio includes selected work in:
- Data Cleaning & Exploration
- Machine Learning
- Full Stack Development

Use the navigation bar above to explore.
